title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, push, create, list, copy, delete, show.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models. Use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat model inside LangChain.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama. Runs entirely in browser, no backend code needed.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI for Ollama with fuzzy-find model picker, chat history, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by Ollama. Local, private code completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Simple fluent API, reactive streaming, Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama. Idiomatic Ruby client with chat, generate, pull, push, list, copy, delete.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of Docker Compose stacks: Ollama + Open WebUI, GPU support, nginx reverse proxy.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama. Use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Minimal Bash library wrapping Ollama REST API with curl and jq for POSIX shells.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model. Slash commands, thread support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI assistance powered by Ollama. Summarize notes, brainstorm ideas.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama deployments with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 with GPU auto-shutdown and S3 model cache.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust client for Ollama using reqwest and tokio. Strong typing, SSE streaming.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package adding Ollama models as pluggable backends for chat and completion APIs.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into Slack channels with mention-triggered replies.
